title: Konteyner tirik, lekin curl ishlamayapti
story: simfix-web konteyneri ishlayapti — docker ps 'Up' deydi, loglar toza.
curl localhost:8098 → 'connection refused'. Konteyner sog', port jim. Nega?
symptom: docker ps → simfix-web Up ✓, lekin curl localhost:8098 → refused
goal: curl localhost:8098 → 'SALOM YANGI APP' qaytsin (konteyner ichida app 8000-portda).
cleanup: docker rm -f simfix-web >/dev/null 2>&1; docker rmi -f simfix-web >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
hints: docker ps chiqishida PORTS ustuniga qara — u yerda nima yozilgan (yoki nima YO'Q)?
Konteyner porti hostga o'zi ochilmaydi — buning uchun run'da -p kerak edi (Day-15).
docker rm -f simfix-web  →  docker run -d --name simfix-web -p 8098:8000 simfix-web
solution: Konteyner izolyatsiyada: ichidagi 8000-port hostga -p 8098:8000 bilan ochilmaguncha ko'rinmaydi. docker ps'da PORTS bo'sh — belgi shu. Fix: konteynerni -p bilan qayta run qilish. 'Konteyner Up, lekin servis ochilmayapti' = 90% hollarda port mapping (Day-15/17).
